[[Category:Religion]]
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Criticism of religion]][[sn:Criticism of religion]]There are many legitimate criticisms of the forms religon has taken in human history. 
This is not a new phenomenon and dates back to at least [[classical greece]]

Addressing these criticisms and developing a religion that manages to avoid the pitfalls of earlier ones is the way forward, rather than attempting to silence such criticisms
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
